title: Russell Hobbs RH01164EU7 20 cm Saucepan with Lid, Induction with Pouring Lip, Stainless Steel Milk Pan, Mirror Polished Soup Pan, Gas and Electric Hobs, Dishwasher Safe, Excellence Collection
features: Perfect for everyday use, this Russell Hobbs Excellence Collection saucepan features a tall body and a mirror polish finish.
Working in any kitchen, this saucepan is suitable for use on gas, electric solid hot plate, halogen, radiant ring and induction hobs.
Made from PFOA-free materials, this saucepan measures 20 cm and comes complete with a matching tempered glass lid with steam vent.
Dishwasher safe and featuring a pouring lip design, it is recommended that the saucepan and lid are hand-washed to maintain the finish.
Please note: Dimensions stated are approximate internal measurements taken from rim to rim.
description: Product Description Russell Hobbs Excellence Collection Transform your cooking experience with our Russell Hobbs Excellence Collection, designed with busy homes and kitchens in mind. With a mirror polish stainless steel body, the collection not only looks great but is long-lasting and will withstand the demands of any busy kitchen. Suitable for all hob types including induction, the pans are dishwasher safe however it is recommended to hand-wash them to maintain the finish. Previous page Pouring Lip Saucepans include a pouring lip, great for draining ingredients and avoiding spillages Mirror Polish Body Made to look good in any setting, the set also includes a heavier base for quicker heat distribution Stackable Steamers Perfect for everyday use, the steamers have multiple tiers to suit the demands of a busy kitchen Soft-Touch Handles Boasting Bakelite TPR soft-touch handles for added safety and maximum comfort Tempered Glass Lid Crafted with tempered glass lids and a steam vent, this durable cookware is made to last Next page 1 Pouring Lip 2 Mirror Polish Body 3 Stackable Steamers 4 Soft-Touch Handles 5 Tempered Glass Lid Excellence Collection Steamer Buying Options Stockpot Add To Basket Saucepan Buying Options Frying Pan Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,458 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,458 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,458 4.2 out of 5 stars 64 Price — £24.49 £ 24 . 49 — — Size Available 18 cm 24 cm (4.8 L) 16, 18, 20 cm 24, 28 cm Pouring Lip ✘ ✔ ✔ ✘ Induction Suitable ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Non-Stick Coating ✘ ✘ ✘ ✔ Mirror-Polish Stainless Steel ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Always Trusted Russell Hobbs offers a wide range of household essentials, specifically designed to help with chores, in the kitchen and beyond. With stunning pans that are both practical and attractive, high quality bakeware, laundry solutions and long-lasting kitchen utensils. All of Russell Hobbs products are high quality and trusted nationwide.
